name: Precious Brady-Davis
bio: Precious Brady-Davis is a transgender activist and environmental advocate appointed to the MWRD board on July 5, 2023 by Gov. J.B. Pritzker to fill the vacancy left by Kimberly du Buclet. She won a special general election in November 2024, defeating Republican R. Cary Capparelli 69.3% to 30.7%. She is seeking her first full 6-year elected term in 2026.
prior_office: MWRD Commissioner (appointed 2023, special election 2024–present). Former communications professional and LGBTQ+ rights advocate. Author of 'I Have Always Been Me' (2018 memoir).

jacket.note: Campaign finance data not pulled; check ISBE or OpenSecrets for current cycle filings

policy_platform.position: Expand green infrastructure: rain gardens, permeable pavement, restored wetlands
Strengthen water quality monitoring and removal of invasive species
Increase public transparency and communications outreach
Environmental justice focus — centering underserved communities
